name: Mani
title: Quality Architect & Technical Lead
tagline: Specializing in delivery management, sophisticated test automation strategies, and bridging the gap between traditional quality engineering and modern AI‑driven autonomous testing.
about: I am a QA / Testing professional experienced in manual testing, leadership, and test automation for US healthcare projects. I focus on claims workflow validation, risk‑based testing, and stakeholder communication, combined with modern automation and AI.
contactNote: Currently exploring opportunities related to AI Agent development, test automation architecture, and technical leadership roles.

projects.title: Playwright MCP Evidence Utility
projects.description: Designing a lightweight evidence-creation tool utilizing an MCP server and Playwright to empower manual testers with auto-annotated screenshots via global hotkeys.

projects.title: Airlock Autologon PoC
projects.description: Developed a PoC for Windows environment automation utilizing Autologon and Task Scheduler to simulate 'Switch User' functionality for unblocking headless execution.

projects.title: AI-Assisted Delivery Management
projects.description: Executing delivery management for automation projects while integrating Generative AI workflows to accelerate developer output using GitHub Copilot.
